Brothers Keepers.description: The Brothers Keepers is an organized crime group based in British Columbia, Canada, founded in 2016 by Gavinder Singh Grewal. The group is engaged in drug trafficking, murder, and other criminal activities across Canada and abroad, with ties to transnational organized crime. It is considered one of the most prominent and violent gangs in British Columbia by the RCMP. The group's membership primarily consists of former Red Scorpions members.

descriptions: Bishnoi gang is listed as a rival of Brothers Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Red Scorpions , United Nations , Kang crime family(BIBO gang) , Bishnoi gang

descriptions: Clan del Golfo is listed as an ally of Brothers Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo Independent Soldiers , Hells Angels , Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Driftwood Crips is listed as an ally of Brothers Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo Independent Soldiers , Hells Angels , Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Driftwood Crips run drug lines for Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers also have a close relationship with the Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Hells Angels is listed as an ally of Brothers Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Clan del Golfo Independent Soldiers , Hells Angels , Driftwood Crips

descriptions: Brothers Keepers have a close alliance with Hells Angels, with members attending funerals.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang also has a close alliance with the Hells Angels, including its 'Hardside' Chapter

descriptions: Independent Soldiers aligned themselves with the Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: He and his crew of Troy McKinnon and Cody Sleigh were Independent Soldiers members, who, along with the rest of the Independent Soldiers gang and the Wolfpack alliance, would become rivals with the Red Scorpions and BIBO gang while aligning themselves with the Brothers Keepers gang.

descriptions: The two gangs are closely allied, having a long alliance in the Wolfpack.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently closely allied to the Independent Soldiers

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with the Kang crime family (BIBO gang).
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently in conflict with the United Nations gang as well as the coalition of the Red Scorpions gang and Kang crime family, which is also known as the BIBO ( Blood In Blood Out ) gang.

descriptions: BIBO gang is allied with Red Scorpions and is a rival of Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: rival organizations such as the Red Scorpions and their allies in the Kang crime family (BIBO gang)

descriptions: Kang group is at war with Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kang Crime Group is known to be in a war with the Brothers Keepers for control of territory in Metro Vancouver.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with the Red Scorpions gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently in conflict with the United Nations gang as well as the coalition of the Red Scorpions gang and Kang crime family, which is also known as the BIBO ( Blood In Blood Out ) gang.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers split from Red Scorpions; they are rivals in a violent conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Red Scorpions splitting into the Brothers Keepers and then the remaining Red Scorpions splitting from the Wolfpack

descriptions: Brothers Keepers was founded by former Red Scorpions members.
edges.evidence_quote: Founded by Gavin Grewal with most of its members and leadership formerly aligned with the Red Scorpions.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with the United Nations gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently in conflict with the United Nations gang as well as the coalition of the Red Scorpions gang and Kang crime family, which is also known as the BIBO ( Blood In Blood Out ) gang.

descriptions: United Nations gang is a rival; Brothers Keepers plotted to kill a UN gang member.
edges.evidence_quote: the rival United Nations gang was believed to be responsible for [the murder]

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with United Nations gang.
edges.evidence_quote: the present underworld conflict between the Brothers Keepers vs. both the Kang group and the United Nations gang

descriptions: Wolfpack alliance aligned with the Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: He and his crew of Troy McKinnon and Cody Sleigh were Independent Soldiers members, who, along with the rest of the Independent Soldiers gang and the Wolfpack alliance, would become rivals with the Red Scorpions and BIBO gang while aligning themselves with the Brothers Keepers gang.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers is listed as an ally of AGC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , CJNG , Brothers Keepers , 'Ndrangheta , Sicilian Mafia , Los Choneros , Los Contrabandistas , Los Cachiros , Los Rastrojos

descriptions: Infobox lists Brothers Keepers as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brothers Keepers

descriptions: Kang group splintered from Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: Formerly a part of the Brothers Keepers organization but due to differences between members, had splintered and formed a new organization.

descriptions: Redd Alert is affiliated with Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: Redd Alert are also affiliated with the Independent Soldiers and Brothers Keepers (gang), two organized crime gangs active across Canada's Western provinces and internationally.

descriptions: The United Nations lists the Brothers Keepers as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brothers Keepers

descriptions: Insane White Boys was recruited by Nazi Lowriders.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1993, the gang Insane White Boys (IWB) was incepted in Orange County and came into prominence being recruited by the Nazi Lowriders as well.

descriptions: Insane White Boys is subservient to Nazi Lowriders.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of these Peckerwood gangs in California are subservient to the authority of Nazi Lowriders, which includes the punk gangs Vicious Circle and La Mirada Punks, as well as Insane White Boys, Independent Skins, Orange County Skins, and a rigid alliance with Southern California Skinhead Alliance (SoCal Skins).

descriptions: Perez-Iodice is a Mazzarella-affiliated clan formed from Buonerba.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo l'arresto di Buonerba si afferma un nuovo clan mazzarelliano in contrasto con la Paranza dei Bambini, i "Perez-Iodice", nato appunto dalle file dei Buonerba.

Black Cobra.description: Black Cobra is one of the largest immigrant street gangs in Denmark, founded in 2000 in Roskilde. With approximately 100 members, it operates in major Danish cities and has expanded into Sweden and Norway. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, extortion, and murder, and is known for its distinctive black and white shirts with a cobra emblem. It controls a youth gang called the Black Scorpions.

descriptions: AK81 lists Black Cobra as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Immigrant gangs (especially the gang from Blågårdsplads): Black Cobra , Black Scorpions, Loyal to Familia , Black Jackets

descriptions: Infobox lists Black Cobra as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Cobra, Comanchero MC, Cossacks MC, Finks MC, Gremium MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Kinfolk MC, Mongols MC, No Surrender MC, Notorious MC, Rebels MC, Red Devils MC, Rock Machine MC, Satudarah MC, Vagos MC

descriptions: Bandidos and Black Cobra were in a violent conflict in 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: A war between the Bandidos and the Black Cobra gang erupted in Køge after Oruc Türkoglu, a leading Black Cobra figure in the city, was wounded in a stabbing by Bandidos members on 29 January 2013.

descriptions: Bandidos and Black Cobra agreed to a truce ending their conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A truce was reached and the conflict was brought to an end after four representatives from each gang met on 29 March 2013.

descriptions: Black Cobra lists AK81 as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels

descriptions: Black Cobra and Bandidos were in a war in 2013, later ended by a truce.
edges.evidence_quote: A war between the Black Cobra and Bandidos erupted in Køge after Oruc Türkoglu, a leading Black Cobra figure in the city, was stabbed and wounded on 29 January 2013.

descriptions: Black Cobra is associated with Black Army.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang has been associated with gangs such as the Black Scorpions and Black Army within Denmark

descriptions: Black Cobra lists Black Ghost as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra lists Black Jackets as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra controls the Black Scorpions youth gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang also control a youth gang called the Black Scorpions.

descriptions: Black Cobra lists Black Spider as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra and Chicanos were in conflict in Sweden in 2013.
edges.evidence_quote: In Sweden, the Black Cobra became involved in a conflict with the Chicanos , a Bandidos support club, after the Chicanos attempted to recruit Black Cobra members.

descriptions: Black Cobra and Hells Angels are rivals engaged in gang warfare over drug and prostitution trade.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang's main rival is the Hells Angels, as in 2007 there was a rise in gang warfare between the two gangs, stemming from conflict over control of the drug and prostitution trade.

descriptions: Black Cobra lists M16 as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Army , Black Scorpions , M16 , Black Ghost , Black Spider , Black Jackets

descriptions: Black Cobra has rivalry with Vaerebros.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Cobra gang has been associated with gangs such as the Black Scorpions and Black Army within Denmark, and have seen to have rivalry with Danish gangs such as the Hells Angels and Bandidos motorcycle gangs, and the Vaerebros.

descriptions: Black Cobra lists X-Team as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: AK81 , X-Team , Bandidos , Chicanos , Hells Angels

descriptions: Chicanos and Black Cobra engaged in conflict and riot.
edges.evidence_quote: The Chicanos in Dalsland became involved in a conflict with the Black Cobra gang after attempting to recruit Black Cobra members. On 5 April 2013, members of the Chicanos and Black Cobra rioted in Trollhättan

V7 - AntiBala.description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Rio Grande do Sul, founded in 2013 in Porto Alegre by André Vilmar Azevedo de Souza ("Nego André") as a coalition to rival the Bala na Cara (BNC) faction. Engaged in drug trafficking, homicides, and robberies, it became known for violent conflicts with BNC and Os Manos, contributing to a wave of violence in the state.

descriptions: Bala na Cara and V7 are in a violent conflict that started in 2016 after a kidnapping and murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Com o crescimento da Bala na Cara , surgiu a facção V7 , que passou a tentar atrasar sua expansão. O conflito entre essas duas facções teve início em 2016, após o sequestro de Jeferson Lapuente , um integrante da BNC.

descriptions: V7 is listed as a rival of Os Manos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: V7 was created to fight Bala na Cara, establishing a conflict relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Sua criação tinha como objetivo enfrentar a facção rival Bala na Cara (BNC) na região.

descriptions: V7 declared war on Bala na Cara in 2016, escalating the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 2016, os V7 declararam guerra à Bala na Cara (BNC), após o sequestro e execução de Jeferson Lapuente, um membro da Bala na Cara.

descriptions: V7 initially had a non-aggression pact with Os Manos, but later entered into war over unpaid debts.
edges.evidence_quote: Os V7 entraram em guerra contra Os Manos por conta de dividas que não foram pagas, no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra, mas por conta das dividas e dos desacertos romperam o acordo.

descriptions: V7 and Os Manos had a non-aggression pact, a cooperative agreement.
edges.evidence_quote: no inicio as duas facções tinham um acordo de 'não se agredir', estando neutra uma a outra

descriptions: Clan del Golfo fought the disappeared group Empresa en Buenaventura.
edges.evidence_quote: así como a otros Grupos Armados Organizados (GAO) como la desaparecida Empresa en Buenaventura

Varrio Nuevo Estrada.description: Chicano criminal street gang founded in the 1940s in the Estrada Courts housing projects of Boyle Heights, Los Angeles. It is one of the most prominent Hispanic gangs in eastside Los Angeles, involved in murder, drug trafficking, and other crimes. The gang operates under the Sureño banner in prison and has ties to the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Varrio Nuevo Estrada is allied with the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños

descriptions: Varrio Nuevo Estrada has a rivalry with White Fence.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: White Fence

descriptions: Varrio Nuevo Estrada is a rival of White Fence.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: All Maravilla sets, Varrio Nuevo Estrada , Armenian Power , others flats gangs

descriptions: Rasta City and Muslim City were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Their main rival used to be Muslim City

'Ndrina Strangio.description: A powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from San Luca, Calabria, Italy. Historical rivals of the Pelle 'ndrina, they are known for the San Luca feud and the 2007 Duisburg massacre. Involved in drug trafficking and other criminal activities.

descriptions: The Giorgi allied with the Strangio 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme agli Strangio , detti janchi

descriptions: After 1995, the Strangio allied with La Maggiore (Scalzone).
edges.evidence_quote: Invece si alleano con i Scalzone gli Strangio , detti janchi, e quelli detti barbari , i Giorgi detti boviciano , e i Nirta versu .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Strangio.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: The Pelle and Nirta-Strangio 'ndrine have been in a violent feud since 1991.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida di San Luca è la guerra nata fra le cosche dei Nirta-Strangio e Pelle-Vottari nel periodo pasquale del 1991.

descriptions: War between Pelle-Romeo and Strangio-Nirta clans, resulting in deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: A war between the two 'Ndrangheta clans Pelle-Romeo (Pelle-Vottari) and Strangio-Nirta from San Luca that had started in 1991 in their home town in Calabria and resulted in several deaths, spilled into Germany in 2007; six men were shot dead in front of an Italian restaurant in Duisburg on 15 August 2007.

descriptions: Nirta-Strangio 'ndrina is listed as a rival of Pelle 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nirta-Strangio 'ndrina

descriptions: The Petullà (Ieraci-Petullà) cooperated with Nirta-Strangio in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto della polizia di Reggio Calabria e Polistena con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà di Cinquefrondi e Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: The Squillace and Nirta-Strangio cooperated in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto della polizia di Reggio Calabria e Polistena con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà di Cinquefrondi e Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: Strangio supplied cocaine to Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 31 gennaio 2017 si conclude l'operazione Dioniso ... cocaina fornita dagli Strangio di San Luca.

descriptions: Targeted together in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: 13 aprile 2016: Operazione Colombiani d'Aspromonte contro i Nirta-Strangio, i Giorgi, i Violi e gli Italiano.

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Iamonte.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... e con la 'ndrina Iamonte

descriptions: Collaboration with Ieraci-Petullà in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto ... con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà ... in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Nirta (La Maggiore).
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... ai Nirta (La Maggiore)

descriptions: Members of Mammoliti arrested with Strangio members for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 marzo 2009 vengono arrestati ... Antonio e Domenico Pizzata, dei Mammoliti detti i fischianti, che gestivano un traffico di droga tra Milano e San Luca.

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Muto.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ... ai Muto di Cetraro

descriptions: The Strangio are historical rivals of the Pelle 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivali storici della potentissima 'ndrina Pelle

descriptions: These two 'ndrine were engaged in the San Luca feud, which included a massacre in Germany.
edges.evidence_quote: Nell'agosto 2007 è ritornata sotto i riflettori la faida di San Luca tra le cosche Nirta-Strangio e Pelle-Vottari dopo la strage di Ferragosto nel ristorante italiano Da Bruno a Duisburg in Germania (6 persone uccise).

descriptions: Nirta-Strangio and Pelle-Vottari were in conflict in the San Luca feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di San Luca : scoppiata nel 1991, ha visto contrapposte le 'ndrine dei Nirta-Strangio e quelle dei Pelle-Vottari.

descriptions: The Pizzata killed a Nirta-Strangio associate.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 24 gennaio 2013 viene trovato morto ... Vincenzo Femia, referente dei Nirta nella capitale. Autore dell'omicidio la cosca dei Pizzata.

descriptions: Collaboration with Squillace in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto ... con 27 arresti di affiliati ... Squillace di Polistena in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.

descriptions: Suspected of involvement in ship sinkings together with the Musitano.
edges.evidence_quote: I Nirta-Strangio sono sospettati di aver avuto a che fare con gli affondamenti di navi ... insieme ai Musitano di Platì

descriptions: Strangio supplied cocaine to Torcasio.
edges.evidence_quote: cocaina fornita dagli Strangio di San Luca

descriptions: The Fruit Belt Gang is in direct opposition to the Central Park Gang, indicating a rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: Fruit Belt Gang also known as the Fruit Belt Posse , is a street gang based in Buffalo, New York in the Fruit Belt area and is the direct opposition to the Central Park Gang.

descriptions: Violence and shootings occur between the two gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: After the establishment of the Central Park Gangs, violence has been rampant between the two gangs in the area of Fruit Belt and Cold Springs and many shootings in the area are due to the violence between the two gangs.

descriptions: Central Park Gang members shot Fruit Belt Gang members in retaliation for a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: On July 4, 2020, members of the Fruit Belt Gang, Antwaine Parker and Michael Woods, were shot by Central Park Gang members and transported to a hospital where Woods threw a gun away at the scene before being transported which caused both members to face illegal gun possession charges which they both pleaded guilty to in September of the same year. The shooting was in retaliation for the murder of Central Park Gang member Shariff Jackson by the Fruit Belt Gang.

La Unión Tepito.description: Mexican criminal organization founded in 2009 in Tepito, Mexico City, under the tutelage of Édgar Valdez Villarreal. It engages in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, murder, money laundering, and other crimes. The group operates primarily in Greater Mexico City and several Mexican states, and is known for using minors in criminal activities. It remains active as of 2021.

descriptions: Infobox lists Unión Tepito as an enemy of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Grupo Flechas, Cártel del Noreste, Cártel de Guasave, Cártel Nueva Plaza, Guerreros Unidos, Artistas Asesinos, Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima, La Familia Michoacana, Los Caballeros Templarios, Los Talibanes, Unión Tepito, Cártel de los Soles, Los Choneros

descriptions: CJNG fights La Unión Tepito for Mexico City.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... La Unión Tepito for Mexico City

descriptions: CJNG is in conflict with La Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... La Unión Tepito for Mexico City

descriptions: CJNG is in conflict with La Unión Tepito over Mexico City.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... La Unión Tepito for Mexico City

descriptions: Unión Tepito is listed as an enemy of Cártel de Tláhuac in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de México SEDENA Ejército Armada Fuerza Aérea Guardia Nacional de México Policía de la Ciudad de México , Grupos Criminales: , Los Rodolfos Unión Tepito , Cartel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión formed from splinter of Unión Tepito, leading to competition for territory.
edges.evidence_quote: varios miembros de la organización se separaron para formar la Fuerza Anti Unión, lo que orillo la competencia de ambos grupos por el control del territorio

descriptions: Infobox lists La Unión Tepito as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Unión Tepito

descriptions: Jalisco New Generation Cartel is a national enemy of La Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ( CJNG )

descriptions: Unión Tepito is allied with CJNG.

descriptions: Unión Tepito considers Cártel de Tláhuac an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Tláhuac

descriptions: Fuerza Anti-Unión is a splinter group that broke away from La Unión Tepito in 2016 due to a murder and kidnapping ordered by La Unión Tepito's leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Fuerza Anti-Unión (a notorious splinter group from La Unión Tepito who broke away from them in 2016 after the founder of Fuerza Anti-Unión, Jorge Flores Concha (aka "El Tortas") had one of his brothers murdered at the behest of "El Betito" (the leader of La Unión Tepito at the time of the crime) and the other kidnapped).

descriptions: Unión Tepito considers Fuerza Anti-Unión an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Fuerza Anti-Unión

descriptions: La Anti Unión Tepito is a splinter group from Unión Tepito, in conflict with it.
edges.evidence_quote: disputas internas que derivaron en escisiones como La Anti Unión Tepito

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is a national enemy of La Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ( CJNG ), the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Kilos is listed as an ally of La Unión Tepito in the infobox.

descriptions: Los Malcriados 3AD is listed as an ally of La Unión Tepito in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Kilos , Los Tanzanios , Los Malcriados 3AD

descriptions: Los Tanzanios is listed as an ally of La Unión Tepito in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Kilos , Los Tanzanios , Los Malcriados 3AD

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel is a national enemy of La Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ( CJNG ), the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: La Unión Tepito and Tláhuac Cartel are enemies and rivals for more than a decade.
edges.evidence_quote: their main rivals within Mexico City are the Tláhuac Cartel (who have been enemies of La Union Tepito for more than a decade)

descriptions: Los Sinaloas is a cell linked to Unión Tepito.
edges.evidence_quote: El 6 de febrero del 2022 la alcaldía de Cuauhtémoc es arrestado Luis Angel López Orea, alias El Pollo, líder de la célula delictiva "Los Sinaloas", ligadas a la Unión

descriptions: Infobox lists Unión Tepito as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Unión Tepito

descriptions: Listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación , Cartel del Norte del Valle , FARC-EP , Cártel de Cali , Unión Tepito , Mafia China

descriptions: Certain cells of La Unión Tepito are listed as rivals of Tren de Aragua in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... La Unión Tepito , Jalisco New Generation Cartel , Los Tiguerones (from November 2023) , Los Lobos

descriptions: El infobox lista a Unión Tepito como aliada del Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Unión Tepito

descriptions: Reccless Tigers are affiliated with West Side Asian Boyz, a faction of Asian Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is affiliated with the West Side Asian Boyz gang and high-ranking members have recently been arrested for murder.

edges.source: Movement for the Emancipation of the Niger Delta
descriptions: MEND is part of JRC, which includes MB; JRC is controlled by MB.
edges.evidence_quote: El MEND es parte del JRC que agrupa al MB, grupo fundado por White ese año, tras dejar de ser portavoz del NDPVF. El JRC se halla controlado por el MB.

descriptions: SSPP formed SSA-N as its armed wing.
edges.evidence_quote: The SSPP later formed the pro-communist Shan State Army – North (SSA-N) to continue the insurgency.

descriptions: UWSA stopped providing weapons to Shan State Army - North in 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: the UWSA declared that they would no longer provide weapons or financial aid to the TNLA, MNDAA, and Shan State Army - North

Foster gang.description: A South African criminal group active in 1914, led by William Henry Foster. The gang committed robberies and murders in Johannesburg and the Rand. After a police standoff, all members and Foster's wife committed suicide.

edges.target: Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista
descriptions: EPL was the armed wing of the Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista.
edges.evidence_quote: se constituyó como el brazo armado del Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista

edges.target: Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista
descriptions: EPL was the military wing of PCdeC-ML.
edges.evidence_quote: El EPL era el brazo militar del Partido Comunista de Colombia - Marxista Leninista

descriptions: Collaboration with Ieraci-Petullà in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º luglio 2008 termina l'operazione Alba e tramonto ... con 27 arresti di affiliati alle cosche Ieraci-Petullà ... in collaborazione anche con appartenenti ai Nirta-Strangio.
